Trait.name: Attractive
Trait.label: Attractive
Trait.description: Possesses features that others find immediately pleasing and memorable.

Trait.name: Unattractive
Trait.label: Unattractive
Trait.description: Possesses features that others find unappealing or off-putting.

Trait.name: Obese
Trait.label: Obese
Trait.description: Carries significantly more body weight than average, affecting mobility and stamina.

Trait.name: Underweight
Trait.label: Underweight
Trait.description: Carries significantly less body weight than average, appearing gaunt and frail.

Trait.name: Muscular
Trait.label: Muscular
Trait.description: Has a visibly well-built, powerful physique.

Trait.name: Tall
Trait.label: Tall
Trait.description: Stands notably taller than the average person.

Trait.name: Short
Trait.label: Short
Trait.description: Stands notably shorter than the average person.

Trait.name: Scarred
Trait.label: Scarred
Trait.description: Bears visible scars from past wounds or battles.

Trait.name: Tattooed
Trait.label: Tattooed
Trait.description: Body is marked with tattoos, often signifying identity, culture, or personal history.

Trait.name: Long Hair
Trait.label: Long Hair
Trait.description: Wears their hair notably long, a distinctive feature of their appearance.

Trait.name: Distinctive Birthmark
Trait.label: Distinctive Birthmark
Trait.description: Bears a prominent, easily-recognized birthmark.

Trait.name: Missing Teeth
Trait.label: Missing Teeth
Trait.description: Has lost several teeth, visibly altering their smile and speech.

Trait.name: Heterochromia
Trait.label: Heterochromia
Trait.description: Has two different colored eyes, an eye-catching and unusual trait.

Trait.name: Pale Complexion
Trait.label: Pale Complexion
Trait.description: Has unusually pale skin, whether from genetics, illness, or a lack of sunlight.

Trait.name: Sun-Weathered Skin
Trait.label: Sun-Weathered Skin
Trait.description: Skin is darkened and roughened from prolonged exposure to the sun.

Trait.name: Well-Groomed
Trait.label: Well-Groomed
Trait.description: Always appears neat, clean, and carefully put together.

Trait.name: Unkempt
Trait.label: Unkempt
Trait.description: Appears disheveled, with little attention paid to grooming.

Trait.name: Striking Eyes
Trait.label: Striking Eyes
Trait.description: Has unusually vivid or piercing eyes that others find hard to forget.

Trait.name: Imposing Stature
Trait.label: Imposing Stature
Trait.description: Physical presence alone is enough to intimidate or command attention.

Trait.name: Disfigured
Trait.label: Disfigured
Trait.description: Bears a severe facial or bodily disfigurement from injury, illness, or birth.
